positive: A vibrant, detailed silhouette illustration of mystical forest flora and fauna: glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, stylized woodland spirits, and gracefully looping vines, arranged in a central circular composition. The art style is neo-whimsical botanical etching combined with ethereal watercolor wash. Emphasize strong contrast between deep midnight blues/forest greens and vibrant neon accents (cyan, magenta, electric yellow). Clean outlines, flat graphic areas for printing, perfect for screen printing or apparel textile print. Composition must be balanced and non-directional, suitable for a patch or repeat pattern.
negative: blur, low resolution, grainy, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, dirty, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy composition, disfigured, dull colors
